title: The τ-Coherence Kernel: Seven Axioms on Five Generators
summary_short: Category τ is uniquely determined by seven axioms K0–K6 on five generators and one operator. The static kernel has a unique model up to isomorphism.

title: Hyperfactorization: Every Object Has a Unique Canonical Normal Form
summary_short: Every object in Category τ carries a unique canonical normal form given by the ABCD coordinate chart, generalising Gödel numbering.

title: Prime Polarity: Primes as Finite Witnesses of Infinity
summary_short: Every prime carries a canonical bipolar polarization via γ/η dominance, rooting all local-global gluing in τ.

title: Mutual Determination: Five Characterizations of Holomorphic Functions
summary_short: Five characterizations of τ-holomorphic functions are mutually equivalent, making the theory structurally over-determined.

title: Central Theorem: O(τ³) ≅ A_spec(L)
summary_short: The algebra of holomorphic functions on τ³ is isomorphic to the spectral algebra of the lemniscate boundary — interior fully determined by boundary.

title: Canonical Ladder: E₀ ⊊ E₁ ⊊ E₂ ⊊ E₃ Is the Unique Maximal Enrichment Chain
summary_short: The enrichment chain E₀ ⊊ E₁ ⊊ E₂ ⊊ E₃ is the unique maximal chain; it terminates at E₃ with no possible E₄.

title: Hinge Theorem: Books IV–VII Are Sector Instantiations of Book III
summary_short: All content of Books IV–VII is a sector instantiation of the Book III template; all inter-sector couplings are rational functions of ι_τ with zero free parameters.

summary_short: All eight Clay Millennium Prize Problems are instances of the Mutual Determination Schema at varying enrichment levels.

title: Three Generations of Matter from H₁(τ³;ℤ) ≅ ℤ³
summary_short: Exactly three independent proofs that the number of fermion generations is three: first homology, primitive winding classes, and lemniscate regions.

summary_short: θ_QCD = 0 exactly, derived from the SA-i admissibility condition on η-winding mod-3 structure. No axion mechanism needed.

summary_short: The W-boson mass is derived as M_W = (17/5)ι_τ⁻³ m_n [1 + (5/17)αι_τ²] at −0.5 ppm from the PDG value.

summary_short: The Higgs boson mass is derived from the structural integer n = 7 = 2·|lobes| + |sectors| at +8.0 ppm from the PDG value of 125.20 GeV.

title: Exactly Three Colors: N_c = 3 from Primorial Depth
summary_short: The number of color charges N_c = 3 is derived from the primorial depth d = 3 of the strong sector.

title: Tensor-to-Scalar Ratio r = ι_τ⁴ = 0.0136
summary_short: The CMB tensor-to-scalar ratio is derived as r = ι_τ⁴ = 0.0136 — a falsifiable prediction for CMB-S4 at ~14σ above the current upper bound.

title: No Dark Matter Particle: Sector Exhaustion Theorem
summary_short: The Sector Exhaustion Theorem proves no additional sector can be added, therefore no dark matter particle exists.

title: Flat Galaxy Rotation Curves from Capacity Gradient
summary_short: Flat rotation curves follow from v_∞ = (GM_b c²/(2ℓ_τ))^(1/4) — the Baryonic Tully-Fisher Relation derived with zero free parameters.

title: No Singularity: Profinite Structure Blocks a → 0
summary_short: The profinite structure of τ³ ensures bounded norms at all stages, so a → 0 cannot occur. The Big Bang is a bounded opening regime.

title: Vacuum Energy = 0: Cosmological Constant Problem Dissolved
summary_short: The τ-vacuum energy is structurally zero (V.T139), dissolving the cosmological constant problem without fine-tuning.

title: Abiogenesis Is Inevitable: Life Is a Thermodynamic Attractor
summary_short: A 7-link chain from axioms K0–K6 to absorbing basin proves that abiogenesis is structurally forced, not a lucky accident.

title: Substrate Abstraction: The 5+3 Life Conditions Are Substrate-Free
summary_short: The 5 τ-Distinction and 3 SelfDesc conditions are jointly necessary and sufficient for life, with no mention of any physical substrate.

title: Black Holes Are Alive: BH Satisfies All 5+3 Conditions
summary_short: Black holes satisfy all 5 τ-Distinction and 3 SelfDesc conditions, making them alive by modus ponens — not by analogy.

summary_short: Stars satisfy τ-Distinction but not SelfDesc, placing them in Quadrant III of the 2×2 matrix — alive by common speech but not by the formal definition.

title: The Categorical Imperative Is the Unique j-Closed Fixed Point
summary_short: Kant's Categorical Imperative is proven to be the unique j-closed fixed point of the τ-digestion operator — ethics derived, not postulated.

summary_short: Three independent structural blockages prevent any E₄: No-New-Lobe, No-New-Crossing-Mediator, and Carrier Closure. The ladder has exactly four layers.

summary_short: Consciousness is a global section of the mind sheaf; binding is sheaf gluing; CC1–CC3 are testable necessary and sufficient conditions.

title: Inevitability: Six Ontic Requirements Force the τ-Kernel
summary_short: Six ontic requirements OR1–OR6 together force K0–K6 and 5 generators; independence is proved by six counterexamples.

summary_short: Any τ-holomorphic function on the boundary L extends uniquely to the interior of τ³ — the Global Hartogs Extension Theorem.

summary_short: If two τ-holomorphic functions agree at any single depth level, they agree at all depths — the τ-analogue of the identity theorem for holomorphic functions.

summary_short: Proper time is derived from the τ-axioms K0–K6 as the parameter of ρ-orbit traversal — time is not postulated but proven.

summary_short: Black hole mass is non-decreasing in the τ-framework (dM/dn ≥ 0 exactly); Hawking evaporation does not occur and information is preserved.

summary_short: The standard genetic code is derived as a BSD-motivic structure achieving top 0.01% performance for error minimization among all possible codes.
